title: Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR)
description: Master the concepts and techniques for Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR). Architect robust backup and recovery strategies that enable rolling back a database state to a specific millisecond to recover from data corruption or "bad code" deployments.
objectives: Master the concepts and techniques for Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR).
Architect robust backup and recovery strategies that enable rolling back a database state to a specific millisecond to recover from data corruption or "bad code" deployments.
